sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_ports (id UInt32, port_value UInt16) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_ports SET port_value = getServerPort('https_port') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, port_value FROM test_ports WHERE port_value = getServerPort('tcp_port');
SELECT getServerPort('mysql_port') AS mysql_port_value UNION ALL SELECT getServerPort('postgresql_port') AS postgresql_port_value;
